text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Awesome, got the cap open on the first try! My
forearm and hand flexors are looking good!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, hey there, Trainer! Taking a break?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If you can't open your drink, just hand it over! I'll
have it open in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The harder to open, the better! My muscles are
screaming for a challenge!
